content: The Ministry referred to its communication dated 20 February 2019 through which the recommendations of the Oversight Committee and the Recruitment Rules (2019) for Non-Teaching Staff of NITs were issued for implementation after approval by the respective Boards of Governors.
The signed set of Annexures referred to in the Ministry communication dated 20 February 2019 was circulated separately for ready reference and implementation by all NITs.

Non-Teaching employees recruited before the implementation of Recruitment Rules issued on 5 February 2014 and 20 December 2017 shall continue to be governed by the educational qualifications that were applicable before those Recruitment Rules came into force.
Employees recruited before the implementation of the Recruitment Rules must undergo the prescribed skill tests or trade tests for future promotions and upgradations.
Employees recruited under the Recruitment Rules issued on 5 February 2014 and 20 December 2017 shall continue to be governed by the provisions of those respective Recruitment Rules.
All NITs are advised to adopt the Recruitment Rules (2019) for Non-Teaching Staff, along with the Annexures and instructions issued by the Ministry, and ensure strict compliance.
